hero.title: Manage Your Mess Like a Pro
hero.subtitle: The complete platform for mess, hostel, PG, and student accommodation management in Bangladesh and beyond.

features.title: Everything You Need
features.subtitle: Powerful tools for mess owners, managers, and members
features.mealTrackingDesc: Track breakfast, lunch, and dinner with automatic meal rate calculation.
features.expenseManagementDesc: Categorize expenses, upload receipts, and get approval workflows.
features.dueManagementDesc: Automatic due calculation based on meals and deposits.
features.depositTrackingDesc: Support bKash, Nagad, Rocket, Upay, bank transfer, and cash.
features.reportsDesc: Daily, weekly, monthly reports with PDF, Excel, and CSV export.
features.mobileFriendlyDesc: Fully responsive design optimized for all devices.
features.aiAnalyticsDesc: Expense forecasts, budget suggestions, and spending pattern analysis.
features.multiLanguageDesc: Full support for English and Bangla.
features.roomManagementDesc: Manage rooms, beds, occupancy, and member assignments.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your mess size

messCost.title: Add Meal Cost
messCost.shoppersHint: Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple shoppers
messCost.creditShopper: Deposit the same amount in the shopper's name?
messCost.successWithDeposit: Meal cost added and deposit credited to shopper(s)

messMeal.title: Log Meals
messMeal.halfMealHint: Use Half (0.5) for half meals. Each member can have different portions.
messMeal.selectMealError: Set at least one meal for a selected member
messMeal.appliedToAll: Copied first member's meals to everyone

messReports.title: Reports & Analytics
messReports.subtitle: Generate detailed financial, meal, member, and settlement reports for any date range.
messReports.dueReportDesc: Members with outstanding dues and collection rate.
messReports.bazaarDesc: Shopping and bazaar expenses for the period.
messReports.dateHint: Used for daily and weekly reports
messReports.selectReport: Select a report type above to preview data.
messReports.bengaliPdfNote: PDF uses Noto Sans Bengali font for proper Bengali text.
messReports.monthlyDesc: Full month summary with member balances and meal costs.
messReports.balanceSheetDesc: Deposits, expenses, dues, and advances for all members.
messReports.memberDesc: Per-member meals, deposits, due, and advance.
messReports.mealDesc: All meal entries with breakfast, lunch, and dinner portions.
messReports.expenseDesc: Approved expenses by category for the month.
messReports.rentDesc: House rent bills and member shares.
messReports.utilityDesc: Electricity, water, gas, and internet bills.
messReports.sharedExpenseDesc: Cleaner, security, maintenance, and other shared costs.
messReports.billSettlementDesc: Member bill shares vs deposits and dues.
messReports.depositDesc: All approved deposits with payment method.
messReports.dailyDesc: Meals, expenses, and deposits for a single day.
messReports.weeklyDesc: 7-day summary of meals, expenses, and deposits.
messReports.yearlyDesc: Month-by-month breakdown for the selected year.

messMonth.title: Start New Month
messMonth.description: Close the current month and begin a new one. A settlement snapshot will be saved.
messMonth.nameHint: You can use any name — e.g. Ramadan Month, Summer 2026
messMonth.success: New month started. Previous month archived.
messMonth.nameTooShort: Month name must be at least 2 characters

messCurrentMonth.title: Current Month Report
messCurrentMonth.noMembers: No active members in this month.
messCurrentMonth.scrollHint: Swipe left on mobile to see all columns.

messMembers.title: Members
messMembers.name: Name
messMembers.deleteConfirm: Remove {name} from this mess? Their history will be kept but they will lose access.

messBills.title: Bills & Utilities
messBills.subtitle: Rent, utilities, and shared costs for this month
messBills.addBillSubtitle: Record a bill and split it among members automatically
messBills.recurringSubtitle: Auto-generate monthly rent, internet, cleaner salary, and more

portalSettings.title: Account Settings
portalSettings.subtitle: Manage your language and account preferences.
portalSettings.languageDesc: Choose how MessFlow Pro is displayed across the portal and mess workspace.
portalSettings.languageHint: Your choice applies immediately and is saved to your account.
portalSettings.comingSoon: Timezone and notification settings coming soon.

portal.subtitle: Portal
portal.noMesses: You are not a member of any mess yet.
portal.memberOf: You are a member of {count, plural, one {# mess} other {# messes}}.
portal.emptyHint: Create your first mess or join one with an invite code to get started.

workspace.readOnlyHint: Read-only view — contact manager to add meals or deposits.

memberCard.emptyHint: No members yet. Share your invite code to add members.

pendingMembers.title: Pending join requests
pendingMembers.description: Approve or reject members who joined with your invite code. No super admin needed.

empty.noDataDescription: Items will appear here once you add them.
